item.title: Remel, Inc: GC Agar Base (150mm) 10/PK R04030; GC Agar Base (100mm) 10/PK R01460 Recall
item.product: GC Agar Base (150mm) 10/PK R04030; GC Agar Base (100mm) 10/PK R01460
item.summary: Reduced or no recovery of some strains of Neisseria gonorrhoeae. Product details: GC Agar Base (150mm) 10/PK R04030; GC Agar Base (100mm) 10/PK R01460
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide distribution - US Nationwide and the countries of Canada, Singapore, and the United Kingdom.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
